node.html: A budget-friendly residential proxy provider offering rotating and sticky SOCKS5/HTTP proxies. Developed the modern web dashboard interface featuring interactive country-level geo-targeting, bandwidth usage statistics, and smooth checkout flows.
An affordable and versatile residential proxy network for seamless global data collection, offering exceptional performance and reliability even when operating at a large scale.
Trust and safety platform experience for Magic Eden, delivering a clearer information architecture and dependable frontend implementation for policy and support content.
Content platform for crypto and NFT market updates, built with React and Next.js to support editorial workflows, performance, and scalable content presentation.
Community-facing product for the Mocaverse ecosystem, built to support an engaging branded experience with interactive frontend flows.
Coffee brand storefront designed to present a premium product story and convert visitors with a clearer product browsing and purchasing experience.
Learner identity platform built to support proof of education and reward-driven user journeys with a responsive React interface.
NFT marketplace experience for the Okay Bears community, built with a strong focus on responsive layout, branded storytelling, and collectible browsing flows.
Official EVISU e-commerce storefront focused on premium product presentation, responsive shopping flows, and custom frontend behavior for a polished retail experience.

React Native mobile app for project information, sales documents, and policy updates, built to make daily internal workflows easier to access on mobile.
